sourceLabel: Neurosynth v7 via NiMARE (parcel-wise Schaefer ROI decode)
description: Compact exploratory Schaefer400 functional association profiles for browser-side lesion-network result interpretation. Each Schaefer parcel was decoded as its own ROI; labels omit the leading 7Networks_ prefix with NiMARE's ROIAssociationDecoder against Neurosynth v7 abstract term TF-IDF annotations. Intended for exploratory interpretation only, not clinical prediction.
